text.title: Cloud Run Monitoring Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cloud-run-monitoring methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: wire-logging
step.action: Add structured JSON formatter to root logger; emit severity + message + trace.

step.name: create-dashboards
step.action: Provision dashboard with request count, latency p50/p95/p99, instance count, CPU/mem.

step.name: create-alerts
step.action: Alert on 5xx rate >1%, p99 latency >SLO, instance count spike, CPU >85%.
step.decision-gate: Verify a synthetic 5xx triggers paging within 5 min.

step.name: enable-trace
step.action: Propagate X-Cloud-Trace-Context on all outbound calls.
